agvs_loop: agvs_loop - Simple AGV sequencer loop that coordinates individual AGV movements between waypoints using operate commands. Includes four configurations: AGV001 (wp2→wp8→wp2 loop), AGV003 (wp4→wp10→wp4 loop), AGV004 (wp9→wp1→wp9 loop), and AGV006 (wp11→wp3→wp11 loop). Each configuration manages AGV leasing, waypoint navigation, and lease release in an infinite loop pattern.
battery_tray: battery_tray - Battery tray sequencer loop that handles AGV load/unload operations for battery tray workflows. Includes four configurations: AGV004 (wp0022→load→gwp0035→wp0007→unload→gwp0042 loop), AGV005 (wp0013→load→wp0006→unload loop), AGV006 (wp0004→load→wp0002→unload loop), and AGV001+AGV002 coordinated loop. Each configuration manages AGV leasing, load operations with payload requests, waypoint navigation through gateway points, unload operations, and lease release.
charging: charging - AGV battery monitoring and charging script that continuously monitors all AGVs in the fleet and automatically sends low battery AGVs to charging stations. Monitors battery levels against configurable threshold (default 20%), manages charging waypoint allocation, sends AGVs to wp0 charging station when battery is low, monitors charging progress, and releases AGVs back to service when battery reaches stop charge threshold (default 35%). Includes reconciliation logic for startup recovery of leased AGVs and active charging jobs.
general_assembly: general_assembly - General assembly sequencer loop designed for assembly line operations with load/unload functionality. Manages eight AGV configurations (AGV001 through AGV008) for loading and unloading operations: AGV001 (load→wp0015→unload→wp0024), AGV002 (load→wp0126→unload→wp0116), AGV003 (load→wp0146→unload→wp0139), AGV004 (load→wp0001→unload→wp0014), AGV005 (load→wp0089→unload→wp0082), AGV006 (load→wp0101→unload→wp0090), AGV007 (load→wp0036→unload→wp0025), and AGV008 (load→wp0068→unload→wp0057). Each configuration manages AGV leasing, load state detection, load operations with payload requests, waypoint navigation, unload operations, and lease release in an infinite loop pattern.
noop: noop - A no-operation example script plugin that demonstrates the plugin implementation without using partial implementations. Provides maximum flexibility by implementing control handling and state reporting from scratch. Simply reflects control requests without performing actual work - accepts all mode transitions, logs control events, and reports state with configurable detailed/verbose reports. Useful as a reference implementation, testing placeholder, or template for custom scripts that need full control over the plugin lifecycle.
prov_trk_agv_kerrigan: prov_trk_agv_kerrigan - Provisions track and AGV infrastructure using Kerrigan make AGVs. Wraps the common provisioning logic (prov_trk_agv_common) with default demo track specification and Kerrigan-specific AGV specifications. Creates and activates track configuration, then provisions and activates AGV fleet with Kerrigan make designation. Designed as a one-shot script (starts in STOPPED mode, runs once when sent RUN control).
prov_trk_agv_battery_tray: prov_trk_agv_battery_tray - Provisions track and AGV infrastructure specifically configured for battery tray operations. Wraps the common provisioning logic (prov_trk_agv_common) with custom track and AGV specifications tailored for battery tray handling workflows. Creates and activates track configuration optimized for battery tray movements, then provisions and activates AGV fleet with battery tray-specific configurations. Designed as a one-shot script (starts in STOPPED mode, runs once when sent RUN control).
prov_trk_agv_general_assembly: prov_trk_agv_general_assembly - Provisions track and AGV infrastructure configured for general assembly line operations. Wraps the common provisioning logic (prov_trk_agv_common) with custom track and AGV specifications optimized for general assembly workflows. Creates and activates track configuration designed for assembly line layouts, then provisions and activates AGV fleet with general assembly-specific configurations. Designed as a one-shot script (starts in STOPPED mode, runs once when sent RUN control).
prov_trk_agv_common: prov_trk_agv_common - Common provisioning logic shared by all track/AGV provisioning scripts. Provides reusable infrastructure for creating and activating track configurations and AGV fleets via Fabric SDK. Handles track creation with configurable TrackSpec (name and TrackConfig), track activation, AGV configuration creation with configurable AgvSpec (list of AGVs with name, description, and make), and AGV activation. Includes helper functions for track and AGV specifications with support for different AGV makes (Kerrigan, Siasun, etc.). Publishes metadata tags showing track name, AGV count, and AGV makes for operator visibility in UI. Used by specialized provisioning scripts (prov_trk_agv_kerrigan, prov_trk_agv_battery_tray, prov_trk_agv_general_assembly) to provide track and AGV specifications.
